from flask import Flask, request, jsonify

app = Flask(__name__)

@app.route("/transfer", methods=["POST"])
def transfer_funds():
    data = request.get_json()
    from_account = data["from"]
    to_account = data["to"]
    amount = data["amount"]

    db = get_db()
    db.execute("BEGIN")
    try:
        db.execute("UPDATE accounts SET balance = balance - ? WHERE id = ?", (amount, from_account))
        db.execute("UPDATE accounts SET balance = balance + ? WHERE id = ?", (amount, to_account))
        db.execute("INSERT INTO transfers (from_id, to_id, amount) VALUES (?, ?, ?)",
                   (from_account, to_account, amount))
        db.execute("COMMIT")
    except Exception:
        db.execute("ROLLBACK")
        return jsonify({"error": "transfer failed"}), 500
    return jsonify({"status": "completed"})

@app.route("/orders", methods=["POST"])
def create_order():
    data = request.get_json()
    db = get_db()
    db.execute("BEGIN")
    try:
        db.execute("INSERT INTO orders (user_id, total) VALUES (?, ?)",
                   (data["user_id"], data["total"]))
        db.execute("UPDATE inventory SET qty = qty - 1 WHERE product_id = ?",
                   (data["product_id"],))
        db.execute("COMMIT")
    except Exception:
        db.execute("ROLLBACK")
        return jsonify({"error": "order failed"}), 500
    return jsonify({"status": "created"})
